    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActiveState
    State representing an active entity.
    Aggregate<T>
    Aggregate interface for creating iterators.
    BrokenState
    State representing a broken entity.
    DeviceDataAPI
     
    EntityState
    Interface for entity states in the State pattern.
    Event
    Represents an event in the factory system.
    EventPool
    Singleton Object Pool for Event objects.
    Factory
     
    FactoryEntity
    Abstract base class for all factory entities.
    FactoryEntityDecorator
    Abstract decorator class for FactoryEntity.
    FactoryEntityFactory
    Factory for creating factory entities.
    Issue
    Represents an issue in the factory system.
    Iterator<T>
    Iterator interface for iterating over a collection.
    JsonConfiguration
     
    JsonUtils
     
    LoggingDecorator
    Decorator that adds logging functionality to FactoryEntity.
    Machine
     
    MachineType
    Enum representing different types of machines.
    Main
    Main class for running the simulation.
    MaterialNeededConfig
    Material needed for a product, with cost.
    Observer
    Observer interface for the Observer pattern.
    Operator
     
    ProductConfig
    Product configuration
    ProductionLine
     
    ProductionLineIterator
    Concrete Iterator for ProductionLine entities.
    Repairer
     
    ReportItem
    Represents a single item in a report.
    ReportVisitor
    Concrete Visitor for generating reports.
    Robot
     
    SimulationRunner
     
    Status
    Enum representing the status of a FactoryEntity.
    StringBuilderPattern
    Builder for constructing detailed string representations.
    Subject
    Subject interface for the Observer pattern.
    TaskStrategy
    Rozhraní pro strategie úkolů.
    TaskStrategyPool
    Pool pro správu instancí TaskStrategy.
    TaskType
     
    Visitor
    Visitor interface for Visitor pattern.
    WeldingStrategy
